display_text: Magnus Aghanim's Scepter: Horn Toss — This upgrade counters positioning-heavy strategies by forcibly relocating enemies to the rear, creating chaos in team fights and enabling follow-up stuns and damage. It transforms Magnus into a disruptor who can split enemy formations.
search_text: Magnus Aghanim Scepter Horn Toss anti-positioning disruptor team fight reposition

display_text: Magnus Aghanim's Shard: Enhances Skewer — Counters map mobility and farming efficiency by punishing enemies for positioning near trees or cliffs. This upgrade turns Magnus into a formidable chaser and area controller, restricting enemy movement.
search_text: Magnus Aghanim Shard Skewer anti-mobility chaser tree cliff damage
